title: People with poor mental health report worse care worldwide
summary_en: WashU researchers find adults struggling with their mental health face more unmet needs and less trust in health systems.
title_cn: [待翻译] People with poor mental health report worse care worldwide

title: Global outbreaks may fuel violence against women — but most cases go unmeasured
summary_en: At WashU Public Health, researchers highlight how outbreaks strain households and systems, revealing hidden risks for women and girls that data often fails to capture.
title_cn: [待翻译] Global outbreaks may fuel violence against women — but most cases go unmeasured

title: Two WashU Medicine researchers named Perlmutter Career Development Assistant Professors
summary_en: Monica Chang-Panesso, MD, and Hysell Oviedo, PhD, were recognized for their research on kidney repair and the brain’s processing of sound and speech, respectively.
title_cn: [待翻译] Two WashU Medicine researchers named Perlmutter Career Development Assistant Professors

title: Witt installed as Kavita and Krishna Bharat Professor
summary_en: Andrew Witt has been installed as the inaugural Kavita and Krishna Bharat Professor in the WashU Sam Fox School. The professorship includes a joint appointment at WashU McKelvey Engineering.
title_cn: [待翻译] Witt installed as Kavita and Krishna Bharat Professor

title: WashU Olin Business launches dual AI initiatives to prepare workers, companies
summary_en: The school is offering $10,000 scholarships to support affected professionals enrolled in the new AI for Business master’s program, while new corporate development offerings help organizations redesign work and reskill teams.
title_cn: [待翻译] WashU Olin Business launches dual AI initiatives to prepare workers, companies
